intro: Allium sativum tincture, also known as garlic tincture, is a concentrated liquid extract made from the bulbs of Allium sativum, a plant species commonly known as garlic. The tincture is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. However, it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using garlic tincture, as it may interact with certain medications or exacerbate underlying health conditions.
